ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage URL for the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie in USD */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or summary of the movie plot */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie in USD */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average user rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of user votes for the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended */,
  "distribution_company" TEXT /* Name of the distribution company */,
  "distribution_status" TEXT /* Current distribution status */,
  "distribution_start_date" TEXT /* Date when distribution started */,
  "distribution_end_date" TEXT /* Date when distribution ended */,
  "international_release_date" TEXT /* International release date of the movie */,
  "international_revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated internationally in USD */,
  "marketing_start_date" TEXT /* Date when marketing started */,
  "marketing_end_date" TEXT /* Date when marketing ended */,
  "marketing_budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for marketing in USD */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the movie */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the movie */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the campaign is associated with */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., TV, Social Media, Print) */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Reach of the campaign */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Impressions generated by the campaign */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the campaign */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  "actual_spend" INTEGER /* Actual spend on the campaign */,
  "remaining_budget" INTEGER /* Remaining budget for the campaign */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) of the campaign */,
  "cpa" REAL /* Cost per acquisition (CPA) of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel used in a campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the channel is associated with */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel (e.g., TV, Social Media, Print) */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "channel_url" TEXT /* URL of the channel (if applicable) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views generated by the channel */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks generated by the channel */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions generated by the channel */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost incurred by the channel */,
  "cpc" REAL /* Cost per click (CPC) for the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_channels_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-10 scale) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the review */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the review */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the review */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the review */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Sentiment type of the review (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, critic, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., favorite genres, actors, directors) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views by the user */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the genre is associated with */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Drama, Sci-Fi) */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor role */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the actor is associated with */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "actor_biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "actor_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the actor */,
  "actor_social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the actor */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "character_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director role */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the director is associated with */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "director_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the director */,
  "director_social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the director */,
  "director_awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the director */,
  "director_nominations" TEXT /* Nominations received by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer role */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the producer is associated with */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "producer_biography" TEXT /* Biography of the producer */,
  "producer_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the producer */,
  "producer_social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the producer */,
  "producer_awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the producer */,
  "producer_nominations" TEXT /* Nominations received by the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_producers_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country release */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the country release is associated with */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date in the country */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated in the country in USD */,
  "country_population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "country_gdp" INTEGER /* GDP of the country */,
  "country_cinema_market_size" INTEGER /* Cinema market size of the country */,
  "box_office_ranking" INTEGER /* Box office ranking in the country */,
  "audience_demographics" TEXT /* Audience demographics in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session */,
  "session_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of sessions by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
